issues.title: AUTH-001: Build Login Form UI
issues.description: Create a responsive login form with email and password fields. Include validation states, error messages, and loading indicator on submit.

issues.title: AUTH-002: Implement Login API Integration
issues.description: Connect login form to authentication API. Handle success, error responses, and store user session token in localStorage.

issues.title: AUTH-003: Add Client-side Validation for Login
issues.description: Validate email format and ensure password field is not empty before allowing submission. Display inline validation messages.

issues.title: AUTH-004: Create Signup Page UI
issues.description: Design and build signup form with fields for name, email, password, and confirm password. Ensure responsive layout and accessibility.

issues.title: AUTH-005: Implement Password Strength Indicator
issues.description: Display visual feedback for password strength based on length, special characters, and complexity rules.

issues.title: AUTH-006: Add Remember Me Functionality
issues.description: Add a 'Remember Me' checkbox to login form and persist session accordingly using localStorage or cookies.

issues.title: AUTH-007: Handle Authentication Errors
issues.description: Display user-friendly error messages for incorrect credentials, locked accounts, and server errors.

issues.title: AUTH-008: Implement Logout Flow
issues.description: Create logout functionality that clears session data and redirects user to login page.

issues.title: AUTH-009: Protect Routes with Auth Guard
issues.description: Restrict access to protected routes based on authentication status. Redirect unauthenticated users to login.

issues.title: AUTH-010: Persist User Session on Refresh
issues.description: Ensure user remains logged in after page refresh using stored auth token.
